summary: Comprehensive testing of Chat Media Features for FaceConnect. Backend: 18/18 tests pass (100%). Frontend: ChatView fully loaded with all enhanced controls - video/voice call buttons, unified attachment menu, emoji/GIF/Stickers picker. GIF messages and Location messages display correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 when no effects applied - expected behavior but could return empty list instead

issues: One GIF shows 'THIS CONTENT IS NOT AVAILABLE' - sticker URL might be invalid or expired

context_for_next_testing_agent: All chat media features working. Conversation ID ea0435de-eb3d-42ea-baa2-19bd4506068f contains test messages with GIF, sticker, and location types. VideoCallEnhanced is properly integrated with enhanced controls (end call, mute, speaker, rotate, effects, add people, screen share, PiP, messages). AI effects endpoints for streams are functional (beauty, background, filter, sticker types supported). File upload supports images, videos, audio, and documents up to 50MB.
